name: Advantage
definition: If you have Advantage on a D20 Test, roll two d20s, and use the higher roll.
full_text: If you have Advantage on a D20 Test, roll two d20s, and use the higher roll. A roll can't be affected by more than one Advantage, and Advantage and Disadvantage on the same roll cancel each other.

mechanics.stacking: A roll can't be affected by more than one Advantage
mechanics.cancellation: Advantage and Disadvantage on the same roll cancel each other
